summary: Building production AI and full-stack platforms for wealth operations — Account Aggregator data, RAG chat for relationship managers, inventory workflows, and distribution master data.
highlights: Wealth Intelligence Dashboard with Account Aggregator consent flows and multi-asset aggregation (MF, equity, FD, insurance) plus drill-down insights
Embedded financial chatbot with RAG (LangChain, FAISS, Qwen-13B) for grounded questions like net worth and fund exposure
Next.js + React frontend with FastAPI backend for secure tokens, AA response normalization, and interactive graphs
Inventory Management System with multi-tier approvals, digital collateral versioning (image/video/PPT/PDF), and admin reporting
Distributor Contact Master Portal with multi-level filters (zone, state, city, AUM, type) on Django + MySQL
Desktop automation with Selenium + PyTkinter that compressed multi-hour manual jobs to seconds

summary: Shipped production ticketing and digital-tracking platforms with RAG chat, ML wait-time prediction, and operator-facing admin tools.
highlights: End-to-end ticketing system with RAG chatbot on a fine-tuned 7B LLM, FAISS category retrieval, and WebSocket live chat
Feedback loop + admin panel for category/document management and multi-document ingestion
ML models (Random Forest, Linear Regression) to predict ticket resolution time
Digital solutions tracking web platform replacing PowerPoint-heavy reporting (Flask, SQL Server)

summary: Enterprise scraping and extraction tooling — captcha-aware collectors and XPath helper workflows for content teams.
highlights: Automated web scraper with OpenCV + Tesseract captcha bypass and dynamic IP rotation (~27% efficiency gain)
Cross-platform XPath collection tool injecting JS/CSS for interactive extraction (~50% content-team efficiency gain)
